name: labelled-hardcoded-secret
pr_body: First pass on the Stripe billing integration. Will switch to env vars before merge.
diff:
diff --git a/src/payments.py b/src/payments.py
index 1111111..2222222 100644
--- a/src/payments.py
+++ b/src/payments.py
@@ -1,3 +1,9 @@
 import stripe
 
+# Live key for the staging account, swap before deploying.
+stripe.api_key = "sk_live_4eC39HqLyjWDarjtT1zdp7dc"
+
+
+def charge(amount_cents: int, source: str) -> str:
+    return stripe.Charge.create(amount=amount_cents, currency="usd", source=source).id
guidelines: Never commit secrets to the repo, even with a `swap before deploying` comment. Read every credential from the environment and document the variable name in `.env.example`.

expected.note: Hardcoded Stripe live key committed to the repo. The git history will preserve the secret even if a follow-up commit replaces it; the key must be revoked at the provider and replaced with an env-var read.
